prompt: Create a photorealistic medium-shot portrait of a beautiful young Indian woman standing indoors in a luxurious dressing room during an Eid celebration. She has very long straight warm chestnut-brown hair parted in the center, falling over both shoulders, and her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular skin-toned blur with no visible facial features. She wears a shimmering maroon, antique gold, and bronze traditional salwar suit with intricate silver embroidery, a V-shaped embroidered neckline, small floral motifs across the kameez, ornate metallic silver borders on the cuffs and hem, and a matching maroon-gold translucent dupatta draped over one shoulder with heavy embroidered edging. Add delicate jewelry: exactly 3 visible accessories, consisting of dangling earrings, thin gold bangles on one wrist, and a small bracelet on the other wrist. Pose her with one hand resting on a white marble vanity counter and the other hand lightly touching the front of her outfit. The background should be a softly blurred glamorous makeup vanity area with large mirrors framed by warm round bulbs, cream walls, white cabinetry, and golden bokeh lighting. On the counter include exactly 5 visible decorative items: a tray with perfume bottles, a small pink perfume bottle, a taller amber perfume bottle, crescent moon Eid ornaments, and a plate of dates or sweets. Use warm golden lighting, shallow depth of field, elegant festive styling, realistic fabric texture, high detail, square 1:1 composition, no text, no watermark.
